name: Banana-Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add the sour cream and mashed bananas to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
